additional_info.description: Optional metadata or additional details for the resource, used for custom purposes.

applications.description: List of applications to be installed, such as Hadoop or Spark. Must be valid application names supported by the cluster.

auto_termination_policy.description: Specifies idle timeout settings for auto-termination. Each object should define an optional idle_timeout in minutes.

autoscaling_role.description: IAM role ARN that allows the cluster to use auto-scaling. Must have proper permissions.

bootstrap_action.description: List of bootstrap actions to execute during cluster provisioning. Each action must define a name, path, and optional arguments.

configurations.description: Custom configurations for applications running on the cluster in string format. Must be valid JSON.

configurations_json.description: Detailed configurations in JSON format for applications. Overrides the 'configurations' field if both are specified.

core_instance_fleet.description: Defines the instance fleet for core nodes, including capacity settings, instance types, and EBS configurations.
core_instance_fleet.type: list(object({id: optional(string),name: optional(string),provisioned_on_demand_capacity: optional(number),provisioned_spot_capacity: optional(number),target_on_demand_capacity: optional(number),target_spot_capacity: optional(number),instance_type_configs: list(object({bid_price: optional(string),bid_price_as_percentage_of_on_demand_price: optional(number),instance_type: string,weighted_capacity: optional(number),configurations: list(object({classification: optional(string),properties: optional(map(string))})),ebs_config: list(object({iops: optional(number),size: number,type: string,volumes_per_instance: optional(number)}))})),launch_specifications: list(object({on_demand_specification: list(object({allocation_strategy: string})),spot_specification: list(object({allocation_strategy: string,block_duration_minutes: optional(number),timeout_action: string,timeout_duration_minutes: number}))}))}))

core_instance_group.description: Configuration for the core instance group, including instance type, count, and EBS settings.
core_instance_group.type: list(object({autoscaling_policy: optional(string),bid_price: optional(string),id: optional(string),instance_count: optional(number),instance_type: string,name: optional(string),ebs_config: list(object({iops: optional(number),size: number,throughput: optional(number),type: string,volumes_per_instance: optional(number)}))}))

custom_ami_id.description: Specifies a custom Amazon Machine Image (AMI) ID for the cluster. Must be a valid AMI ID.

ebs_root_volume_size.description: Size of the EBS root volume in GiB for each instance in the cluster.

ec2_attributes.description: EC2-related settings, such as security groups, subnet IDs, and instance profiles. These attributes determine network and security configurations.

keep_job_flow_alive_when_no_steps.description: Indicates whether the cluster should remain active when no steps are running. Set to true to keep the cluster alive.

kerberos_attributes.description: Kerberos-specific settings for the cluster, including passwords and realm configuration. Required for Kerberos-enabled clusters.

list_steps_states.description: List of step states to filter when querying cluster steps. Valid values include 'PENDING', 'RUNNING', etc.

log_encryption_kms_key_id.description: KMS key ID for encrypting log files stored in Amazon S3.

log_uri.description: S3 URI where the cluster logs will be stored. Must be a valid S3 bucket path.

master_instance_fleet.description: Defines the instance fleet for the master node, including capacity and instance type configurations.
master_instance_fleet.type: list(object({id: optional(string),name: optional(string),provisioned_on_demand_capacity: optional(number),provisioned_spot_capacity: optional(number),target_on_demand_capacity: optional(number),target_spot_capacity: optional(number),instance_type_configs: list(object({bid_price: optional(string),bid_price_as_percentage_of_on_demand_price: optional(number),instance_type: string,weighted_capacity: optional(number),configurations: list(object({classification: optional(string),properties: optional(map(string))})),ebs_config: list(object({iops: optional(number),size: number,type: string,volumes_per_instance: optional(number)}))})),launch_specifications: list(object({on_demand_specification: list(object({allocation_strategy: string})),spot_specification: list(object({allocation_strategy: string,block_duration_minutes: optional(number),timeout_action: string,timeout_duration_minutes: number}))}))}))

master_instance_group.description: Configuration for the master instance group, including instance type, count, and EBS settings.
master_instance_group.type: list(object({bid_price: optional(string),id: optional(string),instance_count: optional(number),instance_type: string,name: optional(string),ebs_config: list(object({iops: optional(number),size: number,throughput: optional(number),type: string,volumes_per_instance: optional(number)}))}))

name.description: The name assigned to the EMR cluster. This value is required and must be unique within the account.

placement_group_config.description: Placement group configuration, specifying the instance role and strategy for instance placement.

release_label.description: Specifies the EMR release version for the cluster, such as 'emr-5.30.1'.

scale_down_behavior.description: Behavior of the cluster when scaling down. Valid values are 'TERMINATE_AT_TASK_COMPLETION' or 'TERMINATE_AT_INSTANCE_HOUR'.

security_configuration.description: Specifies the security configuration to use for the cluster. Must reference an existing security configuration.

service_role.description: IAM role ARN that EMR uses to access resources and perform actions on your behalf. This value is required.

step.description: List of steps to execute on the cluster, each including details such as the action on failure and the Hadoop JAR step.
step.type: list(object({action_on_failure: string,hadoop_jar_step: list(object({args: list(string),jar: string,main_class: string,properties: map(string)})),name: string}))

step_concurrency_level.description: Maximum number of steps that can run concurrently on the cluster.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to tag the cluster. Useful for categorization and resource management.

termination_protection.description: Enables or disables termination protection for the cluster. When enabled, accidental termination is prevented.

unhealthy_node_replacement.description: Indicates whether to replace unhealthy nodes in the cluster automatically.

visible_to_all_users.description: Determines whether the cluster is visible to all IAM users in the AWS account.
